# XWingMLKEM768X25519.PublicKey.EphemeralPrivateKey

**Type Alias**

The type of the ephemeral private key associated with this public key.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias EphemeralPrivateKey = XWingMLKEM768X25519.PrivateKey
```
